calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

PetitionerEllen Wai Lai Chang aka Wailun Lai aka Wai Lun Lai aka Wai Lun Lai Chang was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

The Court accepts the petitioner's school transcripts that has a San Francisco address on it as proof of residency.

It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Wai Lun Lai.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
